mapper.select: SELECT * FROM borrow_record WHERE copy_id = #{copyId} AND return_date IS NULL
SELECT * FROM borrow_record WHERE card_id = #{cardId} AND return_date IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_record WHERE card_id = #{cardId} AND return_date IS NULL
SELECT br.* FROM borrow_record br JOIN library_card lc ON br.card_id = lc.id WHERE lc.student_id = #{studentId} AND br.return_date IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO borrow_record (card_id, copy_id, borrow_date, due_date, is_overdue, create_time) VALUES (#{cardId}, #{copyId}, #{borrowDate}, #{dueDate}, #{isOverdue}, #{createTime})
